caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Cozumel
caribbean.paragraph: Cozumel is experiencing 15 kt winds with 3.4 ft wave heights and a 100% rain probability, while Grand Cayman has 0 kt winds, making Cozumel the top impact port in the Western Caribbean today. I expect these conditions to affect maritime activities in the region, particularly in Cozumel, with its significant rain and moderate winds.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 21 kt winds with 3.4 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Dubrovnik has relatively calm conditions with 9 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail throughout the day, with Cadiz being the more impacted port due to the stronger winds and moderate wave heights.
